corrections.note: Final character is omega with iota subscript (dative), not omicron-upsilon.
Lemma is και οτι, not και ι.
Printed reading is pr τη followed by siglum ℵ and ξς.a; transcript misread siglum as eta and doubled τη.

notes: Running head and body are largely correct. Main body issues are omitted punctuation after ἐλάλησα and wrong repeated verse number 25 where image has 26. Apparatus contains several siglum/lemma misreads.
